series_metadata.series_description: Daily reports that document when retroactive changes are made to business days previously posted in the investment inventory software. Such reports are accompanied by supporting emails, documents, and printed statements. Retroactive entries are made to accommodate sweep accounts, since the sweeping of funds occurs outside normal business hours. Also, retroactive entries are made to correct input and double entry errors.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain until conclusion of current fiscal year, and for an additional 4 fiscal years., Paper: Shred
